trends.name: China DeepSeek AI Disruption
trends.summary: China's DeepSeek AI model triggered a broad market selloff in U.S. tech stocks, with investors reassessing AI valuation premiums. Despite the rout, analysts maintain U.S. AI titans remain fundamentally strong, but the shock highlights competitive risks in the AI space.

trends.name: Oil Price Surge & Market Impact
trends.summary: Rising crude prices are pressuring equity markets, with Dow futures down significantly as IEA's largest-ever oil reserve release fails to contain price increases. The geopolitical tension with Iran conflict intensifying is adding upward pressure on energy costs.

trends.name: Labor Market Softening Signals
trends.summary: Jobless claims fell to lowest levels since mid-May while productivity slowed in Q4 with accelerating unit labor costs. Mixed signals suggest labor market cooling but wage pressures remain, complicating Fed policy outlook.

trends.name: Inflation Moderating But Core Pressures Persist
trends.summary: February inflation edged up overall, but core price pressures eased, suggesting disinflationary trends may be taking hold. This data point influences Fed rate-cut expectations and bonds valuations going forward.

trends.name: Mega-Cap Tech Stock Reversals
trends.summary: Oracle surged after finally escaping AI penalty box with strong execution, while Uber rose on Amazon robotaxi partnership announcement. These moves show selective strength in large-cap tech despite broader sector volatility.

trends.name: Risk-Off Safe Haven Flows
trends.summary: Swiss franc and Japanese yen strengthened as DeepSeek news and broader uncertainty triggered flight-to-safety trades. Gold and precious metals settled lower despite risk-off sentiment, indicating complex market dynamics.

trends.name: Consumer Spending Remains Resilient
trends.summary: Consumer credit growth surged in December, suggesting household spending momentum continues despite economic headwinds. This supports soft-landing narratives but may pressure inflation if sustained.

trends.name: Energy Sector M&A & Diversification
trends.summary: Diversified Energy struck a major Permian Basin deal while QXO launched hostile bid for Beacon, signaling active consolidation in energy and building products. These moves reflect strategic repositioning in traditional sectors.

trends.name: Commodity Price Volatility Spikes
trends.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit records amid U.S.-Colombia tariff tensions, while natural gas fell on weather forecast shifts. Commodity markets showing elevated volatility driven by geopolitics and weather patterns.

trends.name: Retail Innovation & Services Focus
trends.summary: Petco's success leaning into services, fresh food, and specialty products (like tarantulas) demonstrates shifting retail strategy toward higher-margin services over pure merchandising. Beyond's acquisition of Buy Buy Baby brand shows continued retail consolidation.

trends.name: Nvidia-Backed AI Infrastructure Plays
trends.summary: Nebius stock soared following Nvidia investment, highlighting investor appetite for AI infrastructure and compute-heavy businesses. This trend contrasts with broader AI correction, showing bifurcation between infrastructure and application layers.

trends.name: Wealth Migration & Tax Policy
trends.summary: Starbucks' Schultz and other billionaires relocating to Florida signals tax-driven wealth migration. New tax season changes offer savings opportunities, reflecting broader shift in personal finance strategies around state taxation.
